heading: Kelvin Grove vs Kelvinhaugh — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kelvin Grove, Queensland and Kelvinhaugh, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kelvinhaugh has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Kelvin Grove (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kelvin Grove or Kelvinhaugh safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kelvin Grove has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Kelvinhaugh scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kelvin Grove scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Kelvinhaugh scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kelvin Grove or Kelvinhaugh?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kelvinhaugh has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
